en: Does your company have a written process on drug and alcohol testing/management?
Does your company have a written process on how to ensure that driver's licenses are current and valid?
Does your company have a written process to ensure that drivers' disqualification/violations are identified/communicated?
Does your company have a process on how to complete background checks when applicable?
Does your company have an express, written policy on obeying speed limits?
Does your company have a policy prohibiting the use of radar detectors?
Does your company have a consistent method/process in place on how to monitor vehicle service requirements?
Does your company have a process/system in place to assure compliance with service hours regulations based on the jurisdictions you work in?
Does your company have a process/system in place to review driver vehicle inspection reports?
Does your company maintain a current accident register?
Does your company have a process/system in place to address accident prevention?
Does your company have a requirement that all vehicle occupants wear a seat belt?
Please upload all of your company's policies and procedures that apply to your transportation operations. \nUpload #1
Are all drivers in possession of a valid drivers license for the class of vehicle they operate?
Does your company have a defensive driving training program that includes topics such as proper attitude, visual habits, proper decision making skills and appropriate driver actions?
Does the defensive driver training program include an on-road assessment and coaching session?
How often do drivers undergo a refresher defensive driving training class?
Are drivers aware that they are obliged to stop driving if they are fatigued or tired?
Where VDR (Vehicle Data Recorder) are fitted, is there a system is in place to monitor adherence and that appropriate actions are being taken for non-conformances?
Does your company have a policy on the use of mobile phones and two-way radio communication while driving?
Does your company utilize technology in any of your vehicles that electronically deactivates communication equipment when a vehicle is in motion?
Does your company have a written fatigue management program in place?
Do all drivers have to undergo a medical assessment on initial hire and periodically thereafter?
How often do drivers undergo a medical assessment after initial hire?
Does your company have an Emergency Response Assistance Plan (ERAP)?
Does your company's applicable drivers receive Transportation of Dangerous Goods training?
